message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts
Passing tests: 9
Recent changes: All 9 tests now active and passing. The implementation handles:
- Empty grid returns []
- Underpopulation (< 2 neighbors dies)
- Survival (2 or 3 neighbors lives)
- Overpopulation (> 3 neighbors dies)
- Reproduction (dead cell with 3 neighbors comes alive)
- Block still life
- Blinker oscillator

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to next test after completion.

content.text: I'll start by reading both files to understand the current state of the implementation.
Now let me run the tests to confirm all 9 are passing.

input.description: Run tests to confirm all 9 passing
